meta.title: Spoito-cho — Tomodachi Life Paint 84-Color Palette Converter
meta.description: Free image → pixel-art converter for Tomodachi Life paint mode. Auto-match any photo to the 84-color in-game palette. For Mii portraits, hats, clothes, floor art, signs, wallpapers. HSV adjustments, paint-by-number PNG, mirror axes, difficulty score, WebM time-lapse. Browser-only, works on mobile, 12 languages.

upload.noteHtml:
Pixel art, photos, screenshots — anything works.
Non-square images can be cropped to 1:1 on the next screen.
Also accepts .spoito.json files saved from another device.

crop.label: CROP
crop.title: Crop image
crop.descHtml:
Drag corner □ handles to resize, drag inside to reposition.
Pick an aspect ratio below to match how you'll use it in the game.

view.ditherHint: Recommended ON for photos and gradients
view.exportFail:
Failed to generate image.

See the browser DevTools console (F12) for details.
view.pbnConfirm:
Generate a paint-by-number PNG of {w}×{h}.
The file will be large (around 10–40 MB) and may take tens of seconds to create.
Continue?
view.tlUnsupported: Recording not supported in this browser
view.tlEmpty: Recording was empty. Try recording for a bit longer.

color.hintHtml:
Click a pixel in the image on the left,
or enter a HEX code above.

palette.title: Palette (84 colors)
palette.hint: The outlined cell is the closest match. Hover/tap a swatch to highlight matching cells in the image.

fullcolor.section3: 03 In-game steps to pick this color
fullcolor.clipStep2: 2. Return the color square to the top-left (white)
fullcolor.clipStep3: 3. From there, right about {sat} times, down about {val} times
fullcolor.clipStep4: 4. Return the hue slider to the far left (ZL)
fullcolor.clipStep5: 5. From there, press right (ZR) about {hue} times
fullcolor.clipStep5b: (or from the far right, ZL about {hueRev} times)

recipe.title: Color recipe
recipe.hint: Hover/tap a row to highlight matching cells in the image.

favorites.title: Favorite colors
favorites.hint: Use "Add to favorites" to save the selected color

notice.label: NOTICE
notice.title: Before you use
notice.noUploadBody: All processing happens inside your browser.
notice.rightsHead: You own the artwork you create
notice.freeHead: Free to use, share, and modify
notice.freeBodyHtml: See the GitHub license for details.
notice.contactBodyHtml: Reach out via X (@yu_) or GitHub Issues.

guide.title: How to use
guide.p01Html: Drop an image into the frame, or tap the frame to choose a file. No image at hand? Start from Try with demo image.
guide.li02_1: Resize with the corner □ handles (aspect ratio locked at 1:1)
guide.li02_2: Drag inside the frame to reposition
guide.li02_3Html: Confirm crop: crop the selection and proceed to the main screen
guide.li02_4Html: Skip cropping: use the original image as-is
guide.li02_5Html: Reset to center: return the selection to the largest possible square
guide.li02_6Html: After cropping, you can re-select anytime via Re-crop on the main screen
guide.li03_2Html: Game palette: a preview repainted with the in-game 84 colors (grid sizes 16–64, dither ON/OFF)
guide.li04_1: Stay in select mode and tap/click a pixel in the image
guide.li04_2: HEX / RGB / HSV and the nearest palette color appear on the right
guide.p05: When viewing converted, the color recipe shows below. Hover/tap a recipe row or palette swatch to highlight matching cells in the image.
guide.p06Html: Paste a code into the HEX field (top right) and press Apply to see HSV steps without clicking the image. Short forms like #fab also work.
guide.li07_1Html: Palette: shows the nearest of the in-game 84 colors
guide.li07_2Html: Full color: shows the hue slider and approximate operation counts for saturation × brightness
guide.li08_1Html: Pan mode: drag to scroll when zoomed in
guide.li08_2Html: Ruler: shows center lines and X/Y coordinate numbers

fullcolorGuide.satXLabel: Saturation (X): from far left to right, about
fullcolorGuide.valYLabel: Brightness (Y): from top to bottom, about
fullcolorGuide.guideNote: Tap counts are estimates. There may be some discrepancy with the actual game, so use them as a rough guide and fine-tune from there.
fullcolorGuide.huePressZRLabel: → press ZR from far left, about
fullcolorGuide.huePressZLLabel: (or press ZL from far right, about

canvasHint: Click / tap a pixel to pick a color

difficulty.title: About the difficulty score
difficulty.desc: Score 1–100 estimates how challenging painting this image with the 84-color palette will be.
difficulty.foot: Calculated from color count × color scatter. Treat it as a rough guide.
difficulty.easyHint: Few colors, large solid areas, easy to paint
difficulty.mediumHint: Many colors or fine detail mixed in

seo.heading: Image → pixel-art converter for Tomodachi Life paint mode
seo.lead: "Spoito-cho" auto-matches any image to the 84-color in-game palette, helping you paint Mii portraits, hats, clothes, floors, signs and wallpapers in Tomodachi Life. Free, browser-only.
seo.f1: Pixelate to 32×32 grids and auto-quantize to the 84-color palette
seo.f2: "Color recipe" panel: per-color cell count, HEX, HSV, row/col position
seo.f4: HSV brightness/saturation sliders, dithering, mirror axes, done-tracking, difficulty score
seo.f5: Record your progress as a WebM time-lapse
seo.f6: Works on mobile and desktop, runs fully in your browser (no upload), 12 languages

seoFaq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
seoFaq.q1: Q. What's the difference between Spoito-cho and other Tomodachi Life pixel converters?
seoFaq.a1: A. While both convert images to dot art for Tomodachi Life, Spoito-cho includes automatic HSV step-by-step instructions, paint-by-number PNG export, time-lapse recording, difficulty score, mirror axes, and favorite colors — features that support you through the entire painting process.
seoFaq.a2: A. Yes, Spoito-cho is completely free. No account, no app install required — just open in your browser.
seoFaq.q3: Q. Where are my uploaded images sent?
seoFaq.a3: A. Nowhere. All processing happens inside your browser. Your privacy is fully preserved.
seoFaq.q4: Q. Does it work on mobile?
seoFaq.a4: A. Yes, it works on iPhone Safari, Android Chrome, and other mobile browsers. You can crop and pick colors by touch.
seoFaq.a5: A. It's the fixed color set available in the paint feature of Tomodachi Life (Tomodachi Collection: Shin Seikatsu), organized in a 7-row × 12-column grid. Colors are selected via HSV in-game, and Spoito-cho automatically matches your image to these 84 colors and computes the HSV steps for you.
seoFaq.a6: A. It exports your converted dot art with palette numbers (1-84) labeled on each cell. You can print it or display it next to your Tomodachi Life screen, painting cell by cell.
seoFaq.q7: Q. What image formats are supported?
seoFaq.a7: A. PNG, JPG (JPEG), GIF, and WEBP — all major formats. Just drag & drop screenshots, photos, or illustrations.
seoFaq.a8: A. A 1-100 score estimating how difficult it would be to paint your image with the 84-color palette. Based on the number of colors used and their spatial distribution, it's shown as a color-coded badge across 5 tiers (Beginner / Easy / Intermediate / Advanced / Expert).
seoFaq.note: Spoito-cho is an unofficial fan-made tool, not affiliated with Nintendo Co., Ltd., the publisher of Tomodachi Life (Tomodachi Collection: Shin Seikatsu).

bg.label: PRESET
bg.title: Paste Your Image into a Preset
bg.descHtml:
Pick a preset, then upload an image for each blue region.
You can also click numbered regions in the preview to upload individually.
bg.noSlotsFilled: Please upload at least one image
bg.placeHint: Drag to move / Wheel / pinch to zoom
